headline: Starbucks investors reelect full board, rejecting labor-backed challenge
summary: March 30 (Reuters) - In a triumph for Starbucks’ board of directors over a coalition of labor-focused shareholder groups, investors this week overwhelmingly ‌reelected two directors accused by the groups of turning a blind eye to risky ‌labor relations. The tallies were disclosed on Monday.
